title: GoldenEye 007
edition_pinned: GoldenEye 007 Xbox Store listing (2023 enhanced re-release), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1997 Nintendo 64 GoldenEye 007 design.
moat: Difficulty-specific objectives and timed cheat unlocks turn repeated missions into route-planning challenges.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Campaign spaces, weapons, and movement rules double as four-player arenas and replayable objective routes.
exemplar_rationale: Unifies authored stealth objectives, execution mastery, and local competitive rounds in one first-person ruleset.

evidence.claim: Xbox Store product metadata listed: Action & adventure; Classics; Shooter.
